events.label: reasoning
events.text:
>
{"decision": "fail", "risk": "high", "work_stage": "in-progress", "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"], "percent_complete": 60, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.95, "event_time": 0, "rate": 0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["Pneumatic pressure test being conducted without an established exclusion zone", "Personnel are at risk from stored energy release if a fitting, valve, or joint fails", "Required safety controls for pneumatic testing were not implemented before pressurization"], "actions": ["Immediately depressurize the system in a controlled manner", "Establish and mark a pneumatic-test exclusion zone per site safety plan", "Verify all non-essential personnel are outside the exclusion zone", "Confirm test personnel are trained, briefed, and using appropriate PPE", "Re-inspect joints, supports, and restraints before resuming the test", "Resume pneumatic test only after exclusion zone and safety controls are in place"], "rationale": "ASME B31.3 §345 requires pressure testing to be performed safely, and pneumatic testing presents a significant hazard due to stored energy. Conducting a pneumatic test without an exclusion zone is a sequence violation because required safety controls were not implemented before pressurization. The work must stop until the exclusion zone is established and personnel are protected.", "references": ["ASME B31.3 §345"]}
